message:
refactor: use integer arithmetic in format_bytes_compact

Replace floating-point arithmetic with integer division for byte
formatting to avoid potential precision issues and clippy warnings:

- Use u64 constants instead of f64
- Compute decimal part via modulo and scaling
- format_with_one_decimal() helper for consistent formatting

Output unchanged: "1.5 GB", "256.3 MB", etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
